Label: ='Closing Projection Status Date'
Def:
=Date(If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Funded',[Funding Date],
	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'CTC',[CTC Date],
    	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Approved',[UW Final Approval Date],
        	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Conditional Approved',[Conditional Approval Date],
            	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Locked',[Lock Date],
                	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'In Processing',[Sent To Processing],
                    	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Funded',[Funding Date],
                        	If([Closing Projection Group] = 'Not Yet In Processing',[Application Date])))))))))

	If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)' = 'MTD',MilestoneCommonDay,If('$(vMilestoneDateRange)' = 'Last Month',MilestoneCommonDay

     ))))))

Label:
=if('$(vActiveLoansDim)'='Branch',

	Upper(If(WildMatch(Concat([Consolidated Channels],','),'*Retail*') AND WildMatch(Concat([Consolidated Channels],','),'*TPO*'),'Branch & Broker Lender',
	If(WildMatch(Concat([Consolidated Channels],','),'*Retail*'),'Branch','Broker Lender Name'))),
    
    if('$(vActiveLoansDim)'='Mortgage Loan Officer (MLO)',
    
    Upper(If(WildMatch(Concat([Consolidated Channels],','),'*Retail*') AND WildMatch(Concat([Consolidated Channels],','),'*TPO*'),'LO & AE',
	If(WildMatch(Concat([Consolidated Channels],','),'*Retail*'),'Loan Officer','Account Executive'))),
    
    '$(vActiveLoansDim)'
))
